variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17099 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17099 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17099 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 2348 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17099
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.

variants.title: Donaldson P622148 Air Filter, Panel | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17099
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P622148 Air Filter, Panel is designed to provide reliable performance in air filter, panel applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF26502 Air Filter Filter - Panel | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17099
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF26502 panel air filter provides optimized airflow designed with OEM requirements. Protect your investment and extend the life of your equipment with a filter that delivers superior protection.
